raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-D-001] interface.f90:2 <-> header.h:3
  COMPLEX_RETURN_ABI: Fortran COMPLEX(c_float_complex) with BIND(C) returns
  value in XMM0 registers per System V AMD64 ABI.
  C prototype declares void return with hidden sret pointer (f2c legacy).
  These conventions are mutually incompatible.
  BIND(C) guarantees register return; remove the sret convention from C.

NOTE: Compiled with -ff2c flag? Mixes incompatibly with BIND(C) code.
